programme.title: Nature
programme.desc: Tiger expert Valmik Thapar uncovers 50 years of archival footage chronicling the tiger clan of northwestern India's Ranthambore National Park.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NOVA
programme.desc: Scientists try to figure out how to predict weather events called "rain bombs" that sink ships and down planes.

programme.title: Wilding
programme.desc: Isabella Tree and her husband, Charlie Burrell, strive to breathe new life into the ailing Knepp estate. They reintroduce native ponies, deer, pigs and other wildlife, allowing nature to thrive.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: On their annual laundry day, the Kratt brothers disagree on whether blue oceans or green forests are better; Aviva demonstrates how oceans and forests work together.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: Dot and Al announce the Hunters are spending Christmas in Nigeria, and Corky wonders if she can have a fun Christmas without snow.

programme.sub-title: Lyla Can't Sleep; Hairdos and Hair Don'ts
programme.desc: Lyla struggles to sleep and tries to figure out what is wrong with her sleep routine; Lyla tries to do her own hairstyle.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: The Fake Mustache Collection; The Lint Dinosaur Collection
programme.desc: Nico is tired of being mistaken for her twin sister; Carl is upset when Nico breaks the Lint Dinosaur Monday rules and makes a Lint Monster instead.

programme.sub-title: A Trip to the Enchanted Garden; A Trip to the Crayon Factory
programme.desc: Mom Tiger shows Daniel the strawberry patch; crayons are made at the factory.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.sub-title: Paint on the Mail; The Last Box
programme.desc: Phoebe and Jay accidentally get paint on the mail and have to decode addresses; Phoebe and Jay find their parents' box of memories.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: Cinderella needs to tell time for the ball, but her clock is broken, so Nina, Abby and Rudy wonder what tool they can use to fix it.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.sub-title: A Room of Our Own; Zeke's Fairy Village
programme.desc: Malik and Zadie can't agree on how tidy to keep their bedroom; Zeke's friends build houses for the fairies who have moved in.

programme.title: Donkey Hodie
programme.sub-title: Acornball; Super Duper Magic Fun Box
programme.desc: Donkey and Panda make up a game while waiting for Gameshow Gator's new game; Donkey and Panda disagree on which toys are fun.

programme.title: Rosie's Rules
programme.sub-title: An Anniversary Tradition; Chiles en Nogada Day
programme.desc: Rosie, Crystal and Iggy try to recreate Mom and Papá's beach anniversary tradition at home; it's Chiles en Nogada Day, but when Papá loses the recipe, it's up to Rosie to figure out who else might have it.

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why
programme.desc: Elinor finds a peculiar-looking owl while visiting her grandparents in the desert; Olive and her friends investigate why a tree has fallen over in the forest.

programme.title: Alma's Way
programme.desc: Alma and Rafia want to keep a bird's nest safe; Alma and her friends look for a litterbug.

programme.desc: Alaska state basketball champion Kamaka Hepa offers Molly and her basketball team pointers on the court.

programme.title: Xavier Riddle and the Secret Museum
programme.sub-title: I Am David Suzuki; I Am Esther Martinez
programme.desc: David Suzuki explains to Xavier that by taking care of the earth, we take care of ourselves; Esther Martinez explains to Xavier and Yadina about how stories can connect people to their family histories.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A Hassan el Glaoui tempera painting circa 1970; Line Vautrin Talosel mirror; a diamond horseshoe brooch circa 1900.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When one of the world's rarest orchids is smuggled illegally into Midsomer Malham, it triggers a catalogue of passion, jealousy and death.

programme.title: The Forsytes on Masterpiece
programme.desc: Disaster strikes at Forsyte & Co. as Soames puts an end to Irene's Parisian dreams; Louisa faces a shock eviction.

programme.title: California's Gold
programme.desc: Classic teardrop trailers which sleep two and have built-in kitchens.

programme.title: PBS News Hour
programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programme.title: The U.S. and the Holocaust
programme.desc: A group of government officials supports rescue operations; the public sees for the first time the scale of the Holocaust as Allies liberate German camps.

programme.title: Simon Schama: The Holocaust, 80 Years On
programme.desc: Historian Simon Schama examines the Holocaust as a worldwide crime and its impact today, 80 years after the liberation of Auschwitz.

programme.title: The Ship That Turned Back
programme.desc: The dramatic escape of Irving Saraf, from Poland to Palestine in 1940, when he was only seven years old.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Actors Ted Danson, Mary Steenburgen and William H. Macy trace their nonconformist ancestors back to the Puritan establishment.

programme.desc: Donkey feels jealous when Grampy gives Panda a piano lesson; Duck Duck is disappointed when she misses her favorite band.

programme.sub-title: Rosie Gets Moving; The Flying Disc Dilemma
programme.desc: Rosie, Javi and Papa use different kinds of transportation to bring Tia her lucky spoon before her train leaves; Crystal's disc gets stuck in a tree.

programme.desc: Martin and Chris observe wild cats and dogs interacting with each other on the African savanna.

programme.desc: Molly and Vera think about teaching more tourists in Qyah about wildfire prevention; Molly can't wait to hunt for seagull eggs.

programme.title: PBS News Hour
programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programme.title: Washington Week With The Atlantic
programme.desc: A panel of journalists provides reporting and analysis of the major stories emanating from the United States capital.

programme.title: Firing Line With Margaret Hoover
programme.desc: Actor and filmmaker Ben McKenzie unpacks his documentary "Everyone Is Lying to You for Money" and why he argues the crypto boom is built on hype, risk, and deception.

programme.title: Robert Redford: Star of the Silver Screen
programme.desc: The career of actor, director and producer Robert Redford, including his work promoting independent film through the Sundance Film Festival and Institute and his commitment to environmental and political causes.

programme.title: Great Performances
programme.sub-title: Now Hear This: The Call of Istanbul
programme.desc: Exploring the layered sounds of Istanbul where empires met from European classical music to modern jazz.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
